prerequisites: A Teamwork account with access to the projects and data you intend to extract.
Your Teamwork site name (the subdomain in your account URL, e.g. the `yoursite` in `https://yoursite.teamwork.com`), used for the `site_name` config field.
A Teamwork username and password, or an API key used in place of the username, for HTTP Basic authentication (the `username` and `password` fields).
A start date (the `start_date` field) marking the earliest point from which to begin replicating data.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (username and password)
authMethods.summary: Teamwork's API accepts HTTP Basic authentication, where credentials are sent as a base64-encoded `username:password` pair in the Authorization header. Provide your Teamwork `username` and `password`; an API key may be supplied in place of the username. Teamwork recommends Basic auth only over HTTPS/SSL since base64 is easily reversible. Requests are scoped to your workspace via the `https://{site_name}.teamwork.com` subdomain.

setupSteps.title: Identify your Teamwork site name
setupSteps.body: Find the subdomain of your Teamwork account URL. If you sign in at `https://yoursite.teamwork.com`, your site name is `yoursite`. Enter this value in the `site_name` config field. All API requests are directed to `https://{site_name}.teamwork.com`.

setupSteps.title: Gather your Basic auth credentials
setupSteps.body: Teamwork's API supports HTTP Basic authentication using a base64-encoded `username:password` string in the Authorization header. Supply your Teamwork account `username` and `password`. Alternatively, an API key can be used in place of the username. Because base64 is trivially reversible, only use Basic auth over an HTTPS connection.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Provide a `start_date` to define the earliest point from which records should be replicated. Data created or updated on or after this date will be extracted.

setupSteps.title: Configure and run the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter `site_name`, `username`, `password`, and `start_date`, then run the connector. It authenticates against your Teamwork instance using HTTP Basic auth over HTTPS and begins pulling data from the start date onward.
